settings.content: Set where each footer button goes. Easiest way to get the exact address: Online Store > Pages > open the page > click View, then copy the address from your browser bar and paste it below. Social = your Instagram or TikTok link.

settings.label: Contact us link
settings.info: Paste the Contact us page address (e.g. /pages/contact-us).

settings.label: Client services link
settings.info: Paste the Client services page address.

settings.label: Legal notices link
settings.info: Paste the Legal notices page address.

settings.label: Social link (external)
settings.info: Paste your Instagram / TikTok URL. Opens in a new tab.

settings.label: Early access upsell — product
settings.info: Shown above package protection in the cart drawer. Leave empty to hide.

settings.label: Package protection — product
settings.info: Shown as compact row above subtotal. Leave empty to hide.
